signals.headline: US Ends Sanctions Waiver for Russia-Iran Oil Purchases | YES | HIGH**
signals.raw:
US Ends Sanctions Waiver for Russia-Iran Oil Purchases | YES | HIGH**  
The U.S. Treasury announced it will not renew a temporary waiver allowing limited Russian and Iranian oil buys by countries like India, enforcing stricter sanctions as the general license lapses.[3]  
This move signals heightened economic pressure amid geopolitical strains.[3]

Christine Drazan Announces 2026 Oregon Gubernatorial Run** | YES | HIGH confidence

signals.headline: Solana Hits Record 167M Holders in April | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Hits Record 167M Holders in April | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Solana ($SOL) reached an all-time high of 166.9 million unique holders in April 2026, up 8.2% from end-2025 and 12% since October 2025, making it the fourth-largest held L1 token behind BNB, ETH, and TRX[3].
